content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.skill_registry
FILE: cosmos/core/skill_registry.py (1209 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Skill Registry - Dynamic Tool/Skill Discovery & Routing

Provides a centralized registry of ALL capabilities across the swarm:
- Shadow agent capabilities (grok, gemini, claude, etc.)
- Integration tools (X posting, image gen, Solana, Polymarket)
- Hackathon tools (oracle, trading, rug detect

CLASSES:
- SkillCategory(str, Enum): Categories of skills available in the swarm.
- Skill: A registered skill/tool in the swarm.
- SkillRegistry: Central registry of all swarm capabilities.
  Methods: def register_skill(self, skill: Skill) -> None
  Methods: def find_skills(self, query: str, category: Optional[SkillCategory]=None, agent: Optional[str]=None,
  Methods: def get_skill(self, name: str) -> Optional[Skill]
  Methods: def get_agent_skills(self, agent: str) -> list[Skill]
  Methods: def get_category_skills(self, category: SkillCategory) -> list[Skill]
  Methods: def list_all_skills(self) -> list[Skill]
  Methods: def get_skill_summary(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_prompt_context(self, agent: Optional[str]=None, verbose: bool=False) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_skill_registry() -> SkillRegistry
- async def initialize_registry() -> SkillRegistry
